case.prediction_format: Return ranked root causes as objects with `time` as Unix seconds, `component` as a candidate root cause service, and `reason` as a candidate root cause metric.

reasoner.analysis: Checked 720-900s checkoutservice. Mem dev=+374 to +1192 and CPU dev=+59 to +301 persist across all windows. Traces show high self_p99 latency (up to 1.4s) consistent with resource saturation. Logs show normal order flow. Root cause is checkoutservice memory saturation.

Checked 720-900s checkoutservice. Sustained mem (dev=+1040) and cpu (dev=+237-+301) spikes confirm resource saturation as root cause. Traces/logs validate internal latency. Final ranking: checkoutservice_mem, checkoutservice_cpu, frontend_latency.
